---
title: "Literature"
---

```{=html}
<script>
function fetchWithRetry(url, retries=50, delay=1000) {
  return fetch(url).then(r => {
    if (!r.ok) throw new Error('HTTP ' + r.status);
    return r.json();
  }).catch(err => {
    if (retries > 0) {
      return new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, delay))
        .then(() => fetchWithRetry(url, retries-1, delay));
    }
    throw err;
  });
}
</script>
```

## Main PEX26-F51L Paper

[Tanaka, Okumoto, Tamura, Abe, Hirsch, Deng, Ekstein, Chung & Fujiki (2019). *A newly identified mutation in the PEX26 gene is associated with a milder form of Zellweger spectrum disorder.* Cold Spring Harbor Molecular Case Studies.](https://molecularcasestudies.cshlp.org/content/5/1/a003483.long)

## Citations

Papers citing the original PEX26-F51L report, fetched live from Semantic Scholar.

```{=html}
<div style="margin-bottom:1rem;">
  <a href="https://www.semanticscholar.org/paper/e8eec93f5c9e15821b7d041f9e49180f6ce32804" target="_blank">View on Semantic Scholar</a>
  <span id="count-badge" style="margin-left:1rem; color:#666;"></span>
</div>
<div id="results"></div>
<div id="status"></div>

<script>
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
  const API = 'https://api.semanticscholar.org/graph/v1/paper/e8eec93f5c9e15821b7d041f9e49180f6ce32804?fields=paperId,title,citationCount,citations.title,citations.year,citations.authors,citations.externalIds,citations.journal';
  const status = document.getElementById('status');
  const results = document.getElementById('results');
  const badge = document.getElementById('count-badge');

  status.textContent = 'Loading citations…';

  fetchWithRetry(API)
    .then(data => {
      status.textContent = '';
      const citations = (data.citations || []).sort((a,b) => (b.year||0)-(a.year||0));
      badge.textContent = citations.length + ' citing paper' + (citations.length !== 1 ? 's' : '');
      if (citations.length === 0) { status.textContent = 'No citations found yet.'; return; }
      results.innerHTML = citations.map(p => {
        const authors = (p.authors||[]).map(a => a.name).join(', ');
        const journal = p.journal?.name || '';
        const year = p.year || '';
        const doi = p.externalIds?.DOI;
        const url = doi ? 'https://doi.org/' + doi : (p.paperId ? 'https://www.semanticscholar.org/paper/' + p.paperId : null);
        return '<div style="border-top:1px solid #ddd; padding:0.85rem 0;">'
          + '<p style="margin:0 0 4px; font-weight:500;">' + (url ? '<a href="' + url + '" target="_blank">' + (p.title||'Untitled') + '</a>' : (p.title||'Untitled')) + '</p>'
          + '<p style="margin:0; font-size:0.9em; color:#666;">' + (authors ? authors + ' · ' : '') + (journal ? journal + ' · ' : '') + year + '</p>'
          + '</div>';
      }).join('');
    })
    .catch(() => {
      status.textContent = 'Could not load citations. Please refresh the page to try again.';
    });
});
</script>
```

## Related Papers

Live keyword search across Semantic Scholar. Click a keyword to search, or type your own.

```{=html}
<div style="margin-bottom:1rem;">
  <div style="margin-bottom:0.5rem;">
    <strong>Keywords:</strong>
    <button onclick="searchPapers('PEX26 F51L')" style="margin:3px; padding:4px 10px; cursor:pointer; border-radius:4px;">PEX26 F51L</button>
    <button onclick="searchPapers('PEX26 hearing loss')" style="margin:3px; padding:4px 10px; cursor:pointer; border-radius:4px;">PEX26 hearing loss</button>
    <button onclick="searchPapers('PEX1 PEX6 AAA-ATPase')" style="margin:3px; padding:4px 10px; cursor:pointer; border-radius:4px;">PEX1 PEX6 AAA-ATPase</button>
    <button onclick="searchPapers('Pex15 peroxisome')" style="margin:3px; padding:4px 10px; cursor:pointer; border-radius:4px;">Pex15 peroxisome</button>
    <button onclick="searchPapers('peroxisome biogenesis hearing loss')" style="margin:3px; padding:4px 10px; cursor:pointer; border-radius:4px;">peroxisome biogenesis hearing loss</button>
    <button onclick="searchPapers('Zellweger spectrum disorder')" style="margin:3px; padding:4px 10px; cursor:pointer; border-radius:4px;">Zellweger spectrum disorder</button>
  </div>
  <div style="display:flex; gap:8px; margin-top:0.5rem;">
    <input id="search-input" type="text" placeholder="Type your own keyword..." style="flex:1; padding:6px 10px; border:1px solid #ccc; border-radius:4px;"/>
    <button onclick="searchPapers(document.getElementById('search-input').value)" style="padding:6px 14px; cursor:pointer; border-radius:4px;">Search</button>
  </div>
</div>
<div id="search-count" style="color:#666; font-size:0.9em; margin-bottom:0.5rem;"></div>
<div id="search-results"></div>
<div id="search-status"></div>

<script>
function searchPapers(query) {
  if (!query.trim()) return;
  const searchResults = document.getElementById('search-results');
  const searchStatus = document.getElementById('search-status');
  const searchCount = document.getElementById('search-count');

  searchResults.innerHTML = '';
  searchCount.textContent = '';
  searchStatus.textContent = 'Searching for "' + query + '"…';

  const url = 'https://api.semanticscholar.org/graph/v1/paper/search?query=' + encodeURIComponent(query) + '&fields=title,year,authors,journal,externalIds&limit=20';

  fetchWithRetry(url)
    .then(data => {
      searchStatus.textContent = '';
      const papers = data.data || [];
      searchCount.textContent = papers.length + ' results for "' + query + '"';
      if (papers.length === 0) { searchStatus.textContent = 'No results found.'; return; }
      searchResults.innerHTML = papers.map(p => {
        const authors = (p.authors||[]).map(a => a.name).join(', ');
        const journal = p.journal?.name || '';
        const year = p.year || '';
        const doi = p.externalIds?.DOI;
        const url = doi ? 'https://doi.org/' + doi : (p.paperId ? 'https://www.semanticscholar.org/paper/' + p.paperId : null);
        return '<div style="border-top:1px solid #ddd; padding:0.85rem 0;">'
          + '<p style="margin:0 0 4px; font-weight:500;">' + (url ? '<a href="' + url + '" target="_blank">' + (p.title||'Untitled') + '</a>' : (p.title||'Untitled')) + '</p>'
          + '<p style="margin:0; font-size:0.9em; color:#666;">' + (authors ? authors + ' · ' : '') + (journal ? journal + ' · ' : '') + year + '</p>'
          + '</div>';
      }).join('');
    })
    .catch(() => {
      searchStatus.textContent = 'Search failed. Please try again.';
    });
}
</script>
```
